elitePrecision.goal: Ultra-high-win overlay: avoid the Phase22 loss cluster caused by high chop/late VWAP pressure.

highWinGuarded.goal: Higher-trade high-win overlay: prefer compression releases without stretched VWAP pressure.

safety.note: This repository does not place real trades.

auditFindings.finding: No broker/order API is called. All outputs are model, dashboard, Pine indicator metadata, and paper options estimates.

Promoted Phase26 layer is route_durability_score. It is treated as safe for Pine promotion because it uses train-derived route/setup/regime quality and entry-time features, not direct post-entry MFE/MAE selection.
The counterfactual_timing_proxy layer references post-entry MAE as a research proxy. It remains excluded from promotion and should not be used for live/Pine signal selection.
Pine receives the Phase26 mode, metrics, whitelist, and conservative trigger fallback. Exact JS route-stat parity still requires closed-loop TradingView alert capture and forward paper comparison.
Phase26 includes normal and deep cost stress. It still does not model real bid/ask queue position, halts, assignment, option IV crush, or broker fills.
Phase26 is Backtest Promoted, not Forward Proven. It should be forward-shadowed before using it for discretionary decision support.
